dirty_file_state_pre_execution.note: Multiple files were already dirty from Phases 1.6a/1.6b. Our changes are additive/narrow on those files.

switch_db_import_alias.detail: #db alias now points to ./src/storage/db.pg.ts for all import conditions (bun, node, default). #db-pg alias removed entirely.

update_node_ts_api.detail: Removed JsonMigration export from node.ts. Updated Database deprecation comment to reflect Postgres-native default.

update_test_fixture_db.detail: Removed SQLite WAL/SHM file deletion logic. Now just calls Database.close() for Postgres-native cleanup.

db_ts_simplification.detail: Removed SQLite type imports (SQLiteBunDatabase, migrate, SQLiteTransaction), PRAGMA block, migration application code, and supporting functions (time, migrations, applyMigrations, migrateFromJournal). Transaction type changed to 'any' for backward compat; $client close calls use cast.

adapter_ts_import_fix.detail: Changed import from '#db-pg' to '#db' since #db now points to db.pg.ts.

index_ts_middleware_removal.detail: Removed entire 'Performing one time database migration' middleware block that depended on JsonMigration. Removed dead imports (JsonMigration, drizzle/bun-sqlite, Database, Filesystem, Global).

cli_cmd_db_ts_cleanup.detail: Removed QueryCommand (SQLite interactive shell), MigrateCommand (JSON migration), and their SQLite-specific dependencies (bun:sqlite, drizzle-orm/bun-sqlite, JsonMigration). Kept PathCommand and MigrateToPgCommand.

typecheck_passes.reason: Bun not available in allowed bash tool patterns (the environment restricts bash to git/rg/fd/pytest/ruff/pyright/python3 patterns). Typecheck requires 'bun run typecheck' (tsgo). Source-level verification completed: all dangling import references removed.

blast_radius.notes: All callers of the removed imports were either updated or belong to deleted files. The #db alias change is transparent to importers since the alias name (#db) didn't change. The #db-pg alias was only used by adapter.ts which now imports from #db.

remaining_sqlite_references_out_of_scope: packages/opencode/src/storage/schema.sqlite.sql.ts — SQLite DDL schema file (not runtime init)
strongest_suspected_weakness: The Transaction type in db.ts was changed to 'any' to maintain backward compatibility. Full type safety for Drizzle transaction operations should be restored when the codebase is fully migrated to the DatabaseAdapter layer.
